events.rule.httpparameters.HeaderParamet.Description: The headers that need to be sent as part of request invoking the API Gateway REST API or EventBridge ApiDestination.

events.rule.httpparameters.PathParameter.Description: The path parameter values to be used to populate API Gateway REST API or EventBridge ApiDestination path wildcards ("*").

events.rule.httpparameters.QueryStringPa.Description: The query string keys/values that need to be sent as part of request invoking the API Gateway REST API or EventBridge ApiDestination.
